pages.full_text:
INFORMAL CONCERT

Sunday 17th October 2004 : 7.30 p.m. St Edmund's Hall

Bacchanale
    Jonathan Hill (timpani)
    Ian Wright

Moderato
    Michael Allum (piano)
    Haydn

Black and White Blues
    Catherine Ponting (cello)
    Paul Harris

Curtain Call Blues
    'The Five'
    John Foxall (trumpet), Matthew McDade (trombone)
    Jonathan Hill (vibraphone), Gregory Swinford (piano)
    Peter Churchill

Tell me Lovely Shepherd (from Solomon)
    Scott Mahoney (treble)
    Boyce (arr. E.Poston)

Andante
    Andrew McDade (tuba)
    Capuzzi
pages.notes: This page is a glued-in printed concert programme (orange/red background, printed black text), not handwritten diary text. The programme is for an Informal Concert at St Edmund's Hall on 17th October 2004.

pages.full_text:
Andante
    Scott Mahoney (treble)
    Andrew McDade (tuba)
    Capuzzi

Arabesque No.1
    Hanano Kawase (piano)
    C. Debussy

Italian Dance
    Simon Eaton (oboe)
    Madeleine Dring

Trombone Concerto - 2nd movement
    Matthew McDade (trombone)
    Gregory Swinford (piano)
    Lars-Erik Larson

Andante from Concerto
    Eleanor Nichols (flute)
    B. Molique

'Am Abend da es kühle war'
"Mache dich, mein Herze, rein' (from St. Matthew Passion)
    Gregory Swinford (baritone)
    J.S. Bach

Sonata Movement No. 2
    John Kirby (cello)
    Shostakovich

Partita in C Minor - 1st Movement
    Hector Leung (piano)
    J.S. Bach
pages.notes: Continuation of the same glued-in printed concert programme (reverse or second page). No handwritten text present. The overlap at the gutter with the L page repeats 'Andante / Scott Mahoney (treble) / Andrew McDade (tuba) / Capuzzi' — this is the gutter overlap; primary assignment is to the L page.
